# Comet Rocks Developer Docs

> Comet Rocks is headless ecommerce infrastructure. It federates catalog, cart, and checkout across Shopify, Magento, and Salesforce Commerce Cloud into a single Apollo Federation GraphQL API, and powers Checkout Stores (campaign storefronts, also called micro-stores). The API is GraphQL only — there is no REST API. Authentication is via an `x-api-key` header or a JWT bearer token. Pagination uses Relay-style cursor connections.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://docs.comet.rocks/): What Comet is, the platform, and the GraphQL API.
- [Quick Start](https://docs.comet.rocks/quickstart): Connect a Shopify store and make your first API call.
- [Tutorial](https://docs.comet.rocks/tutorial): Launch a full Checkout Store end-to-end.

## Publisher API

- [Apps](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/apps): The App model and how API keys are minted (dashboard or `appClientGenerate`).
- [Authentication](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/authentication/authentication): API keys (`x-api-key`) and JWT tokens (`Authorization: Bearer`, RSA-signed, 12h).
- [Search Products](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/catalog/prod_search): The `productFind` query with filters and pagination.
- [Product by ID](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/catalog/by_id): Fetch a single product by id.
- [Product by SKU](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/catalog/sku): Fetch a product by SKU.
- [Carts & Bags](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/carts): Cart model overview.
- [Create Cart](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/cart_create): Start a cart.
- [Add / Remove Products](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/cart_add): Mutate cart line items.
- [Apply Discount](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/cart_disc): Apply discount codes.
- [Apply Addresses](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/address): Set shipping/billing addresses.
- [Shipping Methods](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/shipping): Retrieve and select shipping.
- [Payment Intent](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/payment): Create a Stripe payment intent.
- [Submit Cart](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/submit): Submit the cart and place the order.
- [Error Handling](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/checkout/errors): Checkout error model.
- [Pagination](https://docs.comet.rocks/resources/pagination): Relay cursor connections (`first/after/last/before`, `PageInfo`, `nodes`).

## Merchant Guides

- [Shopify](https://docs.comet.rocks/merchant/shopify): Connect a Shopify store.
- [Magento 2](https://docs.comet.rocks/merchant/magento): Connect a Magento 2 store.
- [Salesforce Commerce Cloud](https://docs.comet.rocks/merchant/salesforce): Connect an SFCC store.
- [BigCommerce (planned)](https://docs.comet.rocks/merchant/bigcommerce): Roadmap — not yet available.

## Related

- [Comet Help Center](https://comet.rocks/help): Operator/no-code guides, billing, and store management.
- [Dashboard](https://console.comet.rocks): Create apps, mint API keys, and explore the schema.
